// Status: Networking Fabric
// Purpose: Custom UDP protocol with Packet Erasure Coding (FEC) and XOR Recovery.
// Polish: Confirmed correct XOR logic and import structure.

use std::net::UdpSocket;
use std::io;
use std::sync::atomic::{AtomicU32, Ordering};
use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::Mutex;
use std::time::{SystemTime, UNIX_EPOCH};

const CHUNK_SIZE: usize = 1024;
const HEADER_SIZE: usize = 6; // 4 bytes Seq + 1 byte Index + 1 byte Total

/// The Weave networking struct.
pub struct TensorWeave {
    socket: UdpSocket,
    seq_counter: AtomicU32,
    reassembly_buffer: Mutex<HashMap<u32, ReassemblyEntry>>,
}

struct ReassemblyEntry {
    last_seen: u64,
    total_shards: u8,
    shards: HashMap<u8, Vec<u8>>,
}

impl TensorWeave {
    pub fn bind(addr: &str) -> io::Result<Self> {
        let socket = UdpSocket::bind(addr)?;
        socket.set_nonblocking(true)?;
        
        Ok(Self { 
            socket,
            seq_counter: AtomicU32::new(1),
            reassembly_buffer: Mutex::new(HashMap::new()),
        })
    }

    pub fn transmit(&self, target: &str, data: &[u8]) -> io::Result<()> {
        let chunks = data.chunks(CHUNK_SIZE);
        let mut shards: Vec<Vec<u8>> = chunks.map(|c| c.to_vec()).collect();

        // 1. Calculate Parity (XOR FEC)
        let mut p1 = vec![0u8; CHUNK_SIZE];
        for shard in &shards {
            for (i, byte) in shard.iter().enumerate() {
                if i < p1.len() {
                    p1[i] ^= *byte;
                }
            }
        }
        shards.push(p1);

        // 2. Transmit
        let seq_id = self.seq_counter.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);
        let total_shards = shards.len() as u8;

        for (index, shard) in shards.iter().enumerate() {
            let mut packet = Vec::with_capacity(HEADER_SIZE + shard.len());
            packet.extend_from_slice(&seq_id.to_be_bytes());
            packet.push(index as u8);
            packet.push(total_shards);
            packet.extend_from_slice(shard);
            self.socket.send_to(&packet, target)?;
        }
        Ok(())
    }

    pub fn poll(&self) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
        let mut buf = [0u8; 2048];
        match self.socket.recv_from(&mut buf) {
            Ok((size, _src)) => {
                if size < HEADER_SIZE { return None; }
                let packet = &buf[..size];
                let seq_bytes: [u8; 4] = packet[0..4].try_into().ok()?;
                let seq_id = u32::from_be_bytes(seq_bytes);
                let shard_index = packet[4];
                let total_shards = packet[5];
                let payload = packet[6..].to_vec();
                self.handle_packet(seq_id, shard_index, total_shards, payload)
            }
            Err(ref e) if e.kind() == io::ErrorKind::WouldBlock => None,
            Err(e) => {
                eprintln!("Weave error: {}", e);
                None
            }
        }
    }

    fn handle_packet(&self, seq_id: u32, index: u8, total: u8, data: Vec<u8>) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
        let mut buffer = self.reassembly_buffer.lock().unwrap();
        let now = SystemTime::now().duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH).unwrap().as_secs();

        buffer.retain(|_, v| now - v.last_seen < 5);

        let entry = buffer.entry(seq_id).or_insert(ReassemblyEntry {
            last_seen: now,
            total_shards: total,
            shards: HashMap::new(),
        });
        entry.last_seen = now;
        entry.shards.insert(index, data);

        let parity_index = entry.total_shards - 1;
        let data_shard_count = entry.total_shards - 1;
        
        let mut missing_data_indices = Vec::new();
        for i in 0..data_shard_count {
            if !entry.shards.contains_key(&i) {
                missing_data_indices.push(i);
            }
        }

        if missing_data_indices.is_empty() {
            let mut result = Vec::new();
            for i in 0..data_shard_count {
                result.extend_from_slice(&entry.shards[&i]);
            }
            buffer.remove(&seq_id);
            return Some(result);
        }

        // Recovery: Missing = Parity ^ Present_Data_Shards
        if missing_data_indices.len() == 1 && entry.shards.contains_key(&parity_index) {
            let missing_idx = missing_data_indices[0];
            let parity_shard = &entry.shards[&parity_index];
            let mut recovered_shard = parity_shard.clone();

            for i in 0..data_shard_count {
                if i != missing_idx {
                    if let Some(present_shard) = entry.shards.get(&i) {
                        for (b_idx, byte) in present_shard.iter().enumerate() {
                            if b_idx < recovered_shard.len() {
                                recovered_shard[b_idx] ^= byte;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            entry.shards.insert(missing_idx, recovered_shard);

            let mut result = Vec::new();
            for i in 0..data_shard_count {
                result.extend_from_slice(&entry.shards[&i]);
            }
            buffer.remove(&seq_id);
            return Some(result);
        }
        None
    }
}
